<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Verify2\Filters; use Vonage\Entity\Filter\FilterInterface; class TemplateFilter implements FilterInterface { protected ?int $pageSize = null; protected ?int $page = null; public function getQuery(): array { $return = []; if ($this->getPage()) { $return['page'] = $this->getPage(); } if ($this->getPageSize()) { $return['page_size'] = $this->getPageSize(); } return $return; } public function getPageSize(): ?int { return $this->pageSize; } public function setPageSize(int $pageSize): self { $this->pageSize = $pageSize; return $this; } public function getPage(): ?int { return $this->page; } public function setPage(int $page): self { $this->page = $page; return $this; } }
